name: Cloud Security Lab — Kill Chain
description: MITRE ATT&CK techniques exercised by the cloud-security-lab kill chain (attack/) and the runtime attack scenarios (k8s/attack-scenarios/). Import at https://mitre-attack.github.io/attack-navigator/ to view coverage.

techniques.comment: Valid cloud account: leaked IAM access key (attack/00-setup.sh)
Cloud infrastructure discovery via IAM/S3 enumeration (attack/01-enumerate.sh)
Cloud account discovery: users, roles, pivot candidates
Data from cloud storage: S3 PII exfiltration (attack/03-exfil.sh)
Application access token: sts:AssumeRole into pivot role (attack/04-lateral.sh)
Terminal shell in container — Falco: Terminal Shell in Container
Read /etc/shadow, /etc/passwd — Falco: Read Sensitive File in Container
Container escape via host mount — Falco: Container Escape via Mount (CRITICAL)
Ingress tool transfer: drop and execute binary — Falco: Drop and execute new binary
